TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Huling, title = Huling, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Huling} }

S.FORM: Huling Huling o meudus tnbgan,hiya o mklawa sapah ni mkla bi maduk uri.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ ħuliŋ o məudus tnbgan,ħija o mklawa sapaħ ni mkla bi maduk uɾi.
S.FORM: Huling Huling o meudus tnbgan,hiya o mklawa sapah ni mkla bi maduk uri.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ ħuliŋ o məudus tnbgan,ħija o mklawa sapaħ ni mkla bi maduk uɾi.
